Id1.text: Alan Shepard, who was awarded the US Navy Distinguished Service Medal died in California, incidentally a Smilodon is a fossil from California.

Id2.text: Alan Shepard was awarded the Distinguished Service Medal by United States Navy and died in California (where a Smilodon fossil was found).

Id3.text: Alan Shepard, who was awarded the Distinguished Service Medal by the US Navy, died in California where the Smilodon fossil was found.
